ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of residents in the neighborhood */,
  "average_house_value" REAL /* Average value of houses in the neighborhood */,
  "public_transport_accessibility" INTEGER /* Index of public transport accessibility */,
  "parking_availability" INTEGER /* Index of parking availability */,
  "school_quality_index" INTEGER /* Index of school quality in the neighborhood */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Overall crime rate in the neighborhood */,
  "environmental_index" INTEGER /* Index of environmental factors (e.g., pollution levels) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_data" (
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing unit */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood where the housing unit is located */,
  "crim" REAL /* Per capita crime rate by town */,
  "zn" REAL /* Proportion of residential land zoned for lots over 25,000 sq.ft. */,
  "indus" REAL /* Proportion of non-retail business acres per town */,
  "chas" INTEGER /* Charles River dummy variable (= 1 if tract bounds river; 0 otherwise) */,
  "nox" REAL /* Nitrogen oxide concentration (parts per 10 million) */,
  "rm" REAL /* Average number of rooms per dwelling */,
  "age" REAL /* Proportion of owner-occupied units built prior to 1940 */,
  "dis" REAL /* Weighted distances to five Boston employment centres */,
  "rad" INTEGER /* Index of accessibility to radial highways */,
  "tax" INTEGER /* Full-value property-tax rate per $10,000 */,
  "ptratio" REAL /* Pupil-teacher ratio by town */,
  "b" REAL /* 1000(Bk - 0.63)^2 where Bk is the proportion of blacks by town */,
  "lstat" REAL /* % lower status of the population */,
  "housing_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of housing unit */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the housing unit */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the housing unit was built */,
  "last_sale_price" REAL /* Last sale price of the housing unit */,
  "last_sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the last sale */,
  "property_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the property */,
  "heating_type" TEXT /* Type of heating system */,
  "cooling_type" TEXT /* Type of cooling system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_data_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_data_housing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("housing_type_id") REFERENCES housing_types ("housing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_types" (
  "housing_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing type */,
  "housing_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the housing type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the housing type */,
  "average_square_footage" REAL /* Average square footage for the housing type */,
  "average_value" REAL /* Average value for the housing type */,
  "average_rent" REAL /* Average rent for the housing type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the housing unit the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., number of bedrooms, square footage) */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature (e.g., 3, 1200 sqft) */,
  "feature_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_features_housing_id FOREIGN KEY ("housing_id") REFERENCES housing_data ("housing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., real estate agent, investor, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
